// my story

engineer
→ banker.

Hey — I'm Kash. Based in Downingtown, PA. I graduated with a BE in Computer Science Engineering (IoT) from Chandigarh University, spent college building real projects and leading the IEEE Student Branch as Content Lead.

Then I made the move into finance. Now I work as a Personal Banker at S&T Bank — helping clients with everything from account management to loans, credit cards, and digital banking.

My CS background is my edge: I pick up new systems instantly, analyse situations fast, and genuinely understand the tech behind digital banking. I'm a creative, organised problem-solver who's always open to learning new approaches.

Outside work: I love listening to music 🎵, reading books 📚, and travelling ✈️.

connect on linkedin ↗

// 03 — projects

selected
projects.

01
ML · AI · Computer Vision

Sentiment Analysis via Facial Expressions

Built an ML model that detects a person's sentiment from facial expressions captured via a camera module. Analyses depressive states, product engagement, and emotional responses in real time.

Machine LearningComputer VisionPythonCamera Module
02
Data Science · Satellite Imagery

Poverty Predictor Using Satellite Imagery

Predicted poverty levels during "off-years" using satellite imagery data. Enables real-time monitoring of poverty conditions — bridging gaps in traditional survey data.

Data ScienceSatellite DataPythonPrediction Model
03
Full Stack · Web Development

Food Ordering Website

Full-stack online food ordering system with customer ordering, menu management, and admin panel. Built with PHP, SQL, HTML & CSS. Runs on XAMPP/LAMP server.

PHPSQLHTML / CSSFull Stack
